description:
Combine: Put the oats, milk, yogurt, chia seeds, and salt into your container.

Stir/Shake: Give it a good stir or a vigorous shake until all the dry oats are submerged.

Chill: Seal the lid and place it in the fridge for at least 4 hours, but ideally overnight.

Toppings: Add your fresh fruit, nuts, or extra syrup in the morning right before eating to keep them crunchy/fresh.
